summary: Production login issue investigation complete. Login from https://1law-solicitors.com/crm/login with credentials admin/Admin2026 is NOW WORKING. Browser automation test confirmed successful login, token receipt, and redirect to dashboard. All CORS headers are correctly configured.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS configuration is correct - production_origins includes https://1law-solicitors.com
Login API returns 200 with token from browser
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production login is working. Tested from https://1law-solicitors.com/crm/login with admin/Admin2026 credentials. Login returns 200, token is stored, user redirected to dashboard. All CORS headers correct.

production_login.details: Login from https://1law-solicitors.com/crm/login with admin/Admin2026 successful

cors_preflight.details: OPTIONS request returns 200 with correct CORS headers (access-control-allow-origin: https://1law-solicitors.com)

cors_post_request.details: POST login request returns 200 with CORS headers allowing the origin

token_storage.details: JWT token received and stored in localStorage

authenticated_api_calls.details: All subsequent API calls (dashboard/stats, leads, reminders, etc.) return 200

cors_headers.access-control-allow-methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH

investigation_conclusion: The login issue reported by the user appears to be RESOLVED. The production deployment is now correctly handling CORS and login requests. The user should try clearing their browser cache and cookies, then attempt login again. If the issue persists for the user, it may be browser-specific (cached old response) or network-related (proxy/firewall blocking).
